## Checklist

- [ ] `composer analyse` passes with zero PHPStan errors
- [ ] All new public methods and classes have complete PHPDoc blocks
- [ ] `declare(strict_types=1)` is present in every new PHP file
- [ ] No new packages added to the `require` section in `composer.json`
